---
name: "TH2 E3 — Hygiene Apply and Revision Safety"
about: "Implement TH2.E3 Hygiene Apply and Revision Safety"
labels: [epic, TH2, E3]
assignees: [copilot]
---

- [ ] US1 — Apply explicit hygiene plans and return revision anchors: execute only approved cleanup actions and report the resulting revision.
- [ ] US2 — Keep hygiene changes inspectable through revision diff: preserve before/after visibility for cleanup operations.
- [ ] US3 — Reject stale or unsafe hygiene plans without mutating the graph: fail safely when apply inputs are outdated or invalid.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH2-graph-hygiene-and-stats/epics/E3-hygiene-apply-revision-safety/stories/`
